raw_text:
```json
{
  "claims": [
    "California has continuously been ranked the toughest state in the nation for first-time home buyers due to the relatively high cost of housing.",
    "The median home prices for a single-family home in California top the $600,000 price range, more than twice the national average.",
    "The lack of housing supply in California to meet the drastic demand is unprecedented.",
    "The First-Time Home Buyer Opportunity Act would grant homeowners the ability to exclude capital gains of $300,000 for single filers and $600,000 for joint filers from their gross income when selling to first-time homebuyers.",
    "Affordability continues to hamper Californians' ability to buy a home."
  ]
}
```
